package rulecoverage

func NegativeHardcodedTlsMinVersionTooLow() string {
    ruleID := "hardcoded_tls_min_version_too_low"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`tls.Config{MinVersion: tls.VersionTLS10}` or `tls.VersionTLS11` or `tls.VersionSSL30`"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
